title: Crysis Hammers
description: A mod that adds mining and combat hammers with area effects and special abilities. Includes secret hammers, upgrades, and compatibility with other mods, all with a unique and optimized style for Minecraft.
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9de87d843de91dbf7831ce49d494d4557c261d2.png)

This mod introduces versatile **hammers** that revolutionize mining and combat in Minecraft. **Mining hammers** allow you to mine in configurable areas (3x3, 5x5, etc.), while **war hammers** offer powerful melee combat options. Compatible with mods like **Better Combat** and **ore expansions**, it features unique **3D designs**, hidden **easter eggs**, and adjustable settings to keep the experience balanced. Optimized and packed with surprises, this mod takes your singleplayer survival or multiplayer server to the next level!

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a87a9c595ffb448757ad5c72b696cd96782b5f82.png)

## Mining Hammers
**Iron Hammer:** Slow, 3x3 area.

**Gold Hammer:** Very fast, 5x5 area, but very low durability.

**Diamond Hammer:** Slow, 7x7 area, high durability.

**Netherite Hammer:** Fast, 7x7 area, very high durability.

![H1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d91cb06977158c3c4a1ae9a8802607670f9eb90b.png)

## War Hammers
**Nether Warhammer:** Slow, 16 base damage. Obtained by upgrading the Netherite Hammer. Sets enemies on fire when hit.

**End Warhammer:** Slow, 20 base damage. Obtained by upgrading the Nether Warhammer. 30% chance to stun enemies on hit.
![WH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aee2145fa6d243d0eb2e8998d30f7a71c5a5153.png)
## Gold and Diamond Upgrade Plates
The Gold and Diamond Upgrade Plates are special materials you can use at the smithing table to enhance tools and hammers:

**Resource saving:** Upgrade lower-tier hammers (like iron or gold) without spending a full block of the required material.
Compatible with pickaxes: Use them on iron or gold pickaxes with great enchantments to upgrade them to diamond level without losing the enchantments.

![PQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8176c35998615ac785c63c144f8c39d9e7bb355c.png)

## Secret Hammers
This mod features secret hammers hidden throughout the game. We recommend using JEI or experimenting with different materials and recipes to discover them all!


![FF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6722c0e1d199a01b620fd58dd0cacc82cb07be25.png)

Here are some of the planned future additions for the mod:

Smelther Hammer: A hammer that automatically smelts blocks as it mines them, perfect for advanced mining.

Warden Hammer: A powerful hammer featuring traits of the Warden, such as immense strength and a darkness effect on hit.

Gemstone Hammer: A special hammer with Fortune and Luck when mining, increasing the chances of getting gems and rare materials.

Marine Warhammer: Based on the Elder Guardian and Ocean Monument, with special abilities like summoning water bubbles that slow down enemies and dealing extra damage.

Port to Neoforge and future versions: The mod will be ported to Neoforge and future Minecraft versions to ensure compatibility with new updates and optimize performance.

Skins and Secret Hammers: New skins and hammers will be added as references to the mod's developers, featuring unique designs and abilities.

Feel free to suggest more ideas for the mod! We're open to hearing your suggestions.

![C&U](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c925608730210644e91ae05817b2e4dff6457413.png)

[Drift007_](https://x.com/Drift007_): Main designer and unique creator of the hammer models.

**Sponsored by Crysis Studio**: A studio specializing in creating Minecraft events and related content.

Website: https://crysistudio.xyz/
